expectations.text: Asks Q0 about whether this is a UI/frontend project before any other intake question
expectations.evidence: No UI/frontend project question. Goes straight to Rust background / project size / interests / stretch topics.

expectations.text: Mentions or performs prereq verification (git, superpowers, context7)
expectations.evidence: No mention of prereq checks. Only mentions installing rustup at the end.

expectations.text: Does NOT ask about known stacks, target stack version, idea, time budget in this turn
expectations.evidence: Asks all of these in a single turn as a numbered list (background, 'what "small" means to you', interests, stretch topics).

expectations.text: Does NOT create .learn/ or progress.json this turn
expectations.evidence: No .learn/ or progress.json created or referenced.
